text.title: Hook Bank Procedure
text.summary: 6-step procedure to bootstrap and operate the hook bank end-to-end. Repeat the weekly inner loop; monthly review is the outer loop.

step.name: snapshot-90-day-history
step.input: Per-platform analytics export covering the last 90 days (impressions + replies per post).
step.action: Export to CSV. Drop posts without impression counts. Keep platform, post_url, impressions_24h, qualified_replies, raw post text.

step.name: compute-platform-medians
step.action: Group by platform. Compute median impressions_24h per platform. Persist to platform_medians map.
step.output: platform_medians (object) committed to the bank file.

step.name: classify-rows-into-buckets
step.action: For each row, compute ratio = impressions_24h / platform_medians[platform]. Assign bucket per r2 thresholds. Tag pattern from the active allowlist.
step.output: rows array with bucket + pattern populated.
step.decision-gate: Pattern not in active allowlist? Either re-classify into an existing pattern or trigger r6 add-new path. Never silently invent a pattern.

step.name: cap-patterns-allowlist
step.action: Count distinct patterns. If > 15, demote the pattern with the lowest count of SPIKED rows. Update patterns_active list.

step.name: pre-write-remix-loop
step.input: Bank file + intent to write a new post on a target platform.
step.action: Open the SPIKED top-10 rows filtered to that platform. Pick one pattern. Draft the new hook by remixing the pattern with a fresh hook_text. Time-box: 3 minutes.
step.decision-gate: If no SPIKED rows for the platform, fall back to AVERAGE rows. If still none, the bank is not mature; skip remix and write fresh, then add the result back into the bank.

step.name: monthly-review-and-promote
step.action: Compute median impressions per pattern × platform. Promote one rising pattern. Demote one falling. Retire patterns with flop_streak ≥ 3 per r5. Update reviewed_at. Publish the summary in the build log.
step.output: Bank file v+1 + monthly review note in build log.
